name: Gymnase de Fayence
description: Come play pickleball at Gymnase de Fayence in Rexburg, ID! You'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Pickleball Courts at Rexburg Nature Park
description: Come play pickleball at Pickleball Courts at Rexburg Nature Park in Rexburg, ID! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.
